title: Plush Korean Oreos Muchim
description: A jammy, shaggy Korean dessert that mixes crushed Oreos with cream cheese into a crispy muchim, served straight from a paella pan.
instructions: Preheat the paella pan over medium heat and heat sesame oil until shimmering.
In a bowl, mix softened cream cheese, honey, egg yolk, water, vanilla until smooth.
Stir in crushed oreo biscuits, gochugaru, and sesame seeds until a thick, even batter forms.
Spoon the batter into the hot pan, spreading it into a flat, even layer.
Cook the batter for 4-5 minutes until the edges begin to brown and the center sets.
Flip the batter carefully using a spatula and cook the other side for an additional 4 minutes until golden.
Once cooked, transfer the muchim onto a cutting board and let it cool for 2 minutes.
Slice the dish into bite-sized squares and garnish with chopped scallions.
Serve warm; it pairs well with a glass of cold milk or tea.
